xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DisclosureOfNotesOnFinancialRe: 1. Ratios are calculated basis Cumulative Daily Average Balance (CDAB).
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DisclosureOfNotesOnSegmentsExp: PART B: GEOGRAPHIC SEGMENTS: There is only one Segment i.e. Domestic Segment
